tools.name: ats_lint
tools.description: Free, deterministic ATS check: flags banned symbols, first-person voice, non-standard headers, and unquantified bullets. Returns findings + a pass/fail verdict.

tools.name: tailor_cv_to_role
tools.description: Rewrites a CV for a specific job spec using NextRole's multi-pass tailor→critic engine. Free anonymous allowance; on exhaustion returns a link to continue on the web app.

tools.name: score_cv
tools.description: The free first read: scores a CV against a job spec using NextRole's critic engine — overall match, per-dimension scores, strengths, gaps, and the single top priority to fix.

tools.name: find_roles
tools.description: Searches live job listings for a role query (e.g. "frontend engineer London"). Cheap, no LLM — returns a short list of matching roles with company and link.

tools.name: fetch_job_spec
tools.description: Fetches and extracts the job description text from a public job-posting URL, ready to feed into score_cv or tailor_cv_to_role. Cheap, no LLM.

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "score_cv" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: The free first read: scores a CV against a job spec using NextRole's critic engine — overall match, per-dimension scores, strengths, gaps, and the single top pr…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
